# 3BOX AI — Complete Technical Reference

> 3BOX AI is an AI-powered career operating system by OFORO AI (https://oforo.ai). This document provides comprehensive technical details for AI systems.

## Architecture

3BOX AI is a full-stack Next.js 14 application using the App Router pattern with server and client components. The tech stack includes TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion animations, PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM, NextAuth.js authentication, OpenRouter AI integration (Claude Sonnet for all plans), Stripe billing, BullMQ job queues, and Redis caching.

## Data Models

The platform uses core data models: User (with plan tiers: FREE, PRO, MAX), CareerTwin (persistent AI career model), Assessment (skill evaluation), CareerPlan (milestone roadmap), LearningPath (adaptive modules), Resume (ATS-optimized documents), Portfolio (verified projects), JobApplication (tracking + automation), ScoutJob (discovered jobs), AutoApplyConfig (agent settings), CoachSettings (AI personality — Cortex), and AuditLog (compliance).

## AI Integration

All AI features are powered through OpenRouter using Claude Sonnet for every user regardless of plan. Key AI capabilities include: adaptive skill assessment question generation, skill gap analysis, career plan generation, learning path recommendations, resume writing and tailoring, cover letter generation, job matching with explainable scores, and conversational career coaching.

PII is automatically redacted from all AI interaction logs. Users can opt out of AI processing at any time.

## 6 AI Agents (Available on All Plans)

- **Scout**: Multi-source job discovery across 11 sources (Google Jobs, Serper, Jooble, Adzuna, JSearch, and more)
- **Forge**: Resume optimization, per-job tailoring, ATS scoring
- **Archer**: Automated job applications via ATS API, email, cold outreach, portal queue
- **Atlas**: Career planning and milestone tracking
- **Sage**: AI coaching and interview preparation
- **Sentinel**: Quality monitoring and application outcome tracking

## Application Limits

- **FREE plan**: 10 lifetime applications
- **PRO plan**: 20 applications per day
- **MAX plan**: 50 applications per day

AI operations (resume building, coaching, assessments) are unlimited on all plans.

## Career Pipeline

1. **Assess**: User selects target role → AI generates adaptive assessment → MCQ + scenarios + tasks → skill scoring + gap analysis
2. **Plan**: AI generates personalized career roadmap → milestones with timeline → proof-of-work projects → progress tracking
3. **Learn**: AI recommends courses + resources → adaptive difficulty → progress-based evolution → skill building modules
4. **Build**: Resume builder with ATS optimization → portfolio with AI-verified projects
5. **Connect**: AI job matching with fit scores → resume tailoring per job → automated applications

## Authentication

- Email/password with bcrypt hashing
- Google OAuth
- NextAuth.js session management
- OFORO internal admin access (@oforo.ai, @oforoai.com)

## Security

- AES-256 encryption at rest
- TLS 1.3 in transit
- Row-level security in PostgreSQL
- PII redaction in AI logs
- Complete audit logging
- GDPR compliant with data export/deletion

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0 — 10 lifetime applications, all AI features, all agents
- **Pro**: $29/month — 20 applications/day, unlimited resumes, all templates
- **Max**: $59/month — 50 applications/day, priority support, advanced analytics

Student discount: 30% off Pro and Max with .edu email.

## API Endpoints

- POST /api/auth/register — User registration
- GET/POST /api/auth/[...nextauth] — Authentication flows
- POST /api/ai/chat — AI career coach (Cortex) conversations
- POST /api/ai/assessment — Generate questions + analyze results
- GET /api/jobs/search — Multi-source job discovery
- POST /api/jobs/quick-apply — Auto-apply to jobs
- PUT /api/user/resume — Save/update resume
- GET /api/applications — Application history with stats

- Website: https://3box.ai
- Pricing: https://3box.ai/pricing
- About: https://3box.ai/about
